What We Do

Our Services

01
Exhaust & Mufflers

Our specialty. Stock replacements, custom pipe bending, performance upgrades & catalytic converters.

→
02
Custom Exhaust

Full custom fabrication. We bend, weld & build exhaust systems for any vehicle, any spec.

→
03
OBDII & Catalytic Converters

Check engine light? We diagnose emissions codes, replace cats & clear smog failures.

→
04
Brake Repair

Pads, rotors, drums & hydraulics. We stop you safely and get you back on the road fast.

→
05
General Maintenance

Belts, hoses, filters, oil changes & tune-ups. Keep your car running longer for less.

→
06
Foreign & Domestic

From Japanese imports to American trucks — we service all makes and models.

→
